tasks.command:
if command -v npm > /dev/null; then npm run build; else echo '

🚨 ACTION REQUIRED: Node.js is not installed! 🚨

macOS is blocking automatic terminal installation. You MUST manually install Node.js to proceed.

1. Go to https://nodejs.org
2. Download and install the macOS Installer.
3. Completely restart VS Code.

'; exit 1; fi
tasks.label: npm: build - server

tasks.command:
if command -v npm > /dev/null; then cd server && npm install && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json; else echo '

🚨 ACTION REQUIRED: Node.js is not installed! 🚨

macOS is blocking automatic terminal installation. You MUST manually install Node.js to proceed.

1. Go to https://nodejs.org
2. Download and install the macOS Installer.
3. Completely restart VS Code.

'; exit 1; fi
tasks.label: tsc: build - server/tsconfig.json
